channel.title: Sviatoslav Foshchii Insights
channel.description: Practical notes on Salesforce Marketing Cloud, martech migrations, CRM operations, agile delivery and AI-assisted project work.

item.title: What I learned migrating from Adobe Campaign to Salesforce Marketing Cloud
item.description: A migration is less about moving templates and data than protecting marketing continuity while people learn a new operating model.

item.title: How to keep marketing operations running during a platform migration
item.description: The safest migration plan treats business-as-usual work as a first-class workstream, not an interruption.

item.title: How I use AI as a project delivery partner, not a replacement
item.description: AI is most useful when it speeds up framing, documentation and iteration while people still own judgement, risk and accountability.
